case_title: SPECK CAB COMPANY VS. WAYNE HORIUCHI et al

docket_entries.description: ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR MAR-10-2003. FEB-14-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SPECK CAB COMPANY DBA ARROW CAB COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT HORIUCHI, WAYNE DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-14-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-16-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-30-2003
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-10-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS & COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SPECK CAB COMPANY DBA ARROW CAB COMPANY SERVED OCT-22-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HORIUCHI, WAYNE
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT HORIUCHI, WAYNE
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT FILED AND ENTERED
